title: DDS
biography: William Morton was an American dentist who gave the first public demonstration of ether anesthesia at Massachusetts General Hospital in 1846, known as 'Ether Day,' one of the most important events in medical history.
aiSummary: William Morton is a anesthesiology specialist at Massachusetts General Hospital. Based in Boston.

timeline.title: Ether Day demonstration
timeline.description: Publicly demonstrated surgical anesthesia at Massachusetts General Hospital, launching the era of painless surgery
